subtasks.title: Define role and permission matrix
subtasks.details: Create explicit permission table for admin and trader roles covering data ingestion, strategy publish, recommendation override, and execution controls.
acceptance_criteria: Permission matrix reviewed and signed off.
Every API endpoint mapped to at least one permission.
questions: Can traders pause admin-provided strategies for their account only?

subtasks.title: Design auth token lifecycle
subtasks.details: Define access token TTL, refresh token rotation, logout invalidation, and multi-device policy.
acceptance_criteria: Token lifecycle documented with sequence diagrams.
questions: Required session duration for active trading hours?

subtasks.title: Create API and event naming conventions
subtasks.details: Standardize URI naming, event topic naming, payload versioning strategy, and idempotency keys.
acceptance_criteria: Sample contracts validated with two services.
questions: Should versioning be URI-based (/v1) or header-based?

subtasks.title: Define cross-service observability contract
subtasks.details: Standardize correlation IDs, trace context propagation, log fields, and error envelope format.
acceptance_criteria: Trace IDs visible across request chain.
Common error model used in all services.
questions: Do we enforce structured JSON logs from day one?
